PreOne The Digital System for Modern Preschools MARKET COMPARISON: PREONE vs OTHER PRODUCTS Why PreOne is the Next Generation Preschool Platform ### FEATURE COMPARISON | Feature | Brightwheel (Global) | Kinderpedia (Global) | Typical Indian ERP (e.g. MyClassboard, Entab) | PreOne (Next Gen Platform) | |-----------------------------|---------------------|---------------------|---------------------------------------------|---------------------------| | Attendance | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ Advanced | | Fee Management | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ Advanced | | Parent Communication | ✔️ | ✔️ | ⚠️ Basic | ✔️ Premium | | Photos & Videos | ✔️ | ✔️ | ⚠️ Basic | ✔️ Premium | | Daily Reports | ✔️ | ✔️ | ⚠️ Basic | ✔️ AI Powered | | Admission CRM | ✔️ | ⚠️ Partial | ❌ | ✔️ Advanced CRM | | Child Development Tracking | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ | ✔️ Deep AI Tracking | | AI Teacher Assistant | ✔️ | ⚠️ Partial | ❌ | ✔️ Yes (AI) | | AI Parent Coach | ✔️ | ⚠️ Partial | ❌ | ✔️ Yes (AI) | | Childhood Passport (Lifetime Profile) | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ | ✔️ Yes | | Digital Memory Timeline | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ | ✔️ Yes | | Pickup Verification (OTP/Face) | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ Basic | ✔️ OTP + Face + QR | | Franchise / Multi-Branch Dashboard | ✔️ | ⚠️ Partial | ❌ | ✔️ Yes | | AI Growth Insights & Analytics | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ | ✔️ Yes (AI Powered) | | Modern & Premium UI/UX | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ Outdated | ✔️ Ultra Premium | | Preschool-First Design | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ No | ✔️ 100% | ✔️ = Available / Strong ⚠️ = Partial / Limited ❌ = Not Available / Weak ### KEY DIFFERENCES AT A GLANCE | MARKET PRODUCTS (Focus on School Operations) | PREONE (Focus on Child + Parent + Future) | |--------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------| | Data Management
Store data | Journey Management
Preserve every memory & growth | | Manual Reports
Teacher writes | AI Generated Reports
Smart, actionable, insightful | | Communication Tools
Notices, messages | Smart Communication Hub
Chat, voice, translate, notify | | Basic Analytics
Attendance, fees only | AI Growth Engine
Predict, analyze, improve | | Photo Sharing
Gallery only | Memory Timeline
Life-long moments timeline | | Safety Basic
Basic pickup | Advanced Safety
OTP, Face, QR, Authorization | | No AI
Human dependent | AI Everywhere
Teachers, Parents, Admin, Owner | | Single Branch
Limited | Multi Branch / Franchise
Centralized intelligent dashboard | ### PARENT EXPERIENCE COMPARISON | Other Products (Typical) | PreOne Experience | |-------------------------|-------------------| | Information Based
Passive updates | Experience Based
Engaging & Emotional | ### CHILDHOOD PASSPORT – ONLY IN PREONE A Life-long Digital Portfolio
Preserve Every Moment, Celebrate Every Milestone - Photos & Videos - Growth Reports - Activities - Riya Sharma (D.O.B. 20 Jan 2021) - Achievements - Certificates - Timeline ### AI GROWTH ENGINE – PREONE ADVANTAGE | Teacher Inputs (Activities, Observations, Ratings, Notes) | Output Example (Riya’s Growth Overview) | |--------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------| | AI Analysis Engine (Analyzes behavior, skills, patterns) | Overall Score: 85% (Very Good) | | Smart Insights (Growth Areas, Strengths, Suggestions) | Communication: 90% | | Personalized Report (For Parents + Teachers) | Social Skills: 80% | | AI Suggestion (Riya is doing great in creativity; Focus a little more on communication activities.) | Cognitive: 75% | | | Creativity: 95% | | | Physical: 70% | ### TECH & PLATFORM SUPERIORITY - Cloud Native: Scalable, Secure, Always Available - AI Powered: Smarter every day - Mobile First: Designed for modern parents & teachers - Secure & Compliant: Data privacy & child safety first - Open Integrations: Payment, SMS, WhatsApp, GPS, etc. - Regular Updates: New features, based on user feedback ### WHY PREONE? - Built for Preschools (Not a general school ERP) - Loved by Parents (Better engagement & trust) - Time Saver (Automate & simplify tasks) - Increase Revenue (Better admissions & retention) - Future Ready (AI, Automation & Analytics) - One Platform for All (Parents, Teachers, Admins, Owners) ### OUR VISION To build the most loved Preschool Platform that empowers educators, engages parents and helps every child grow & shine. ### PREONE PLATFORM FLOW Admission → Enroll → Daily Activities → Learning & Growth → AI Insights → Reports → Happy Child → Satisfied Parents ### PERFECT FOR - Single Preschools - Preschool Chains - Daycare Centers - Play Groups - Franchises
